prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约10379名，2024年约10481名，两年基本持平；2025年骤降至约3949名，较前两年大幅前移约6500名，竞争显著加剧。近3年位次波动剧烈，2025 年为最新基准位次；本省理科计划2023年34人、2024年34人，2025年扩至52人；2026年计划37人，较2025年缩招约29%。缩招意味着录取名额减少，对位 次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2025年第61名、2026年第63名，近年排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和认可 度显著增强，对高分考生吸引力提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及2025年在河北、河南等省份录取位次下滑及部分专业断档信号，可能对部分考生报考心 理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第103、评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高；中医学、中西医结合为该校王牌学科；中药学等学科实力突出，在中医药领域具有标杆地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业（临床医学、口腔医学等）社会热度持续偏高，中医药作为医学大 类整体关注度稳定；本省2026年考生总数仅提供总人数238000人（口径与往年不一致），无法直接比较分科变化，但，反映整体竞争强度上升；该校位于北京市，对新疆考生存在一定地域距离因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅 前移的竞争惯性、2026年缩招约29%的供给收缩、学校排名持续提升的吸引力增强，以，预计2026年最低位次在2025年3949名基础上进一步前移；预测最低位次约3316名，区间2816–3816名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 10379, in 2024 approximately 10481, basically stable over two years; in 2025 it sharply dropped to about 3949, moving forward by about 6500 places compared to the previous two years, significantly intensifying competition. Rankings have fluctuated dramatically in the past three years, with 2025 being the latest baseline ranking; the provincial science enrollment plan was 34 in 2023, 34 in 2024, and expanded to 52 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 37, a reduction of about 29% compared to 2025. A reduction in enrollment means fewer admission slots, putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing its appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a decline in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan in 2025 and signals of major gaps in some programs, which may somewhat suppress the application psychology of some candidates; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, with average evaluation, and low exposure on short video platforms; Traditional Chinese Medicine and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are its flagship disciplines; Chinese Materia Medica and other disciplines have outstanding strength, holding a benchmark position in the field of traditional Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs (clinical medicine, stomatology, etc.) maintain consistently high social popularity, and traditional Chinese medicine, as a major medical category, has stable overall attention; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is only provided as 238000 (the caliber is inconsistent with previous years), making direct comparison of subject distribution changes impossible, but it reflects an overall increase in competition intensity; the university is located in Beijing, which presents a certain geographical distance factor for Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the competitive inertia of the significant ranking advance in 2025, the supply contraction of about 29% in 2026, and the enhanced attractiveness of the university's continuously rising ranking, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 3949; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3316, with a range of 2816–3816.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2816–3816, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 programs as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship programs as a stretch, and use Tier 3 programs as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 2800) can focus on impacting top programs such as the Traditional Chinese Medicine Leading Talent Training Program and Hua Tuo Class; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (e.g., around 3800) should primarily target Tier 3 programs, while also considering lower-ranking programs in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 460, shifted forward to about 355 in 2024, and significantly shifted backward to about 1856 in 2025, with drastic fluctuations over the past 3 years; 2025 is the latest baseline ranking. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 3 students from 2023 to 2025, and increased to 4 students in 2026, an expansion of about 33%. Expansion means an increase in admission slots, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science list has been rising in recent years (63rd in 2026), with enhanced overall strength, which also attracts liberal arts candidates to some extent. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in admission rankings and signal of gaps in multiple provinces in 2025, which may suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 103rd, with an average evaluation. Traditional Chinese Medicine and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are the university's flagship disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data file does not include this university's data). Liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Traditional Chinese Medicine, Acupuncture and Tuina, and English (Medical Direction), closely related to the university's core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of medical majors remains relatively high, and attention to traditional Chinese medicine-related majors is stable. The total number of candidates in this province in 2026 only provides the total number, making it impossible to directly compare changes by subject, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity. The university is located in Beijing, which presents a certain geographical distance factor for liberal arts candidates from Xinjiang.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the supply increase of about 33% due to expansion in 2026, and the positive effect of the university's ranking improvement, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1856. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2197, with a range of 1802–2592.
